headline: Pool Corporation Announces Upcoming Investor Conference Participation
summary: COVINGTON, La., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) announced today that it will participate in the following investor events in June 2026: June 2, 2026 – Stifel 2026 Boston Cross Sector 1x1 ConferenceJune 3, 2026 – Baird 2026 Global Consumer, Technology & Services ConferenceJune 4, 2026 – William Blair 46th Annual Growth Stock ConferenceJune 9, 2026 – Oppenheimer 26th Annual Consumer Growth & E-Commerce ConferenceJune 10, 2026 – 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials and Mate

headline: Pool Corporation Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Pool Corporation has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
